## openclaw-event-server-plugin v1.0.3

This release makes the project production-ready for open community contribution and first-time adoption.

### Highlights
- Added a full contributor hygiene baseline:
  - PR/branch CI workflow
  - CODEOWNERS
  - pull request template
  - issue templates
  - CONTRIBUTING and SECURITY policy docs
  - Dependabot weekly npm updates
- Improved README onboarding with clear install paths and contributor/security pointers.
- Maintained stable Tool Guard behavior with the prior blocked-event integration test stabilization.

### Why this matters
OpenClaw users can now adopt the plugin quickly from npm while teams and community contributors have a safer, cleaner path to collaborate through guarded PR workflow, automated checks, and clear contribution standards.
